results.definition_en: Not different; the very one.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 相同的、一樣的;非不同、即指同一者。
results.example_en: She wears the same hat every day.
results.example_zh_tw: 她每天都戴同一頂帽子。

results.definition_en: Coming after the first.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 第二的、其次的;位於第一之後的。
results.example_en: She got the second prize.

results.definition_en: Apart; not joined to another.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 分開的、各別的;與他物分離的。
results.example_en: Keep the milk in a separate cup.
results.example_zh_tw: 把牛奶倒在另一個杯子裡。

results.definition_en: Of great worth, not for play; or grave.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 嚴重的、認真的;非戲謔、具重要性。
results.example_en: She has a serious look on her face.

results.definition_en: Able to cut; with a thin edge or point.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鋒利的、銳利的;邊或尖端細利、可切割。
results.example_en: Be careful with that sharp knife.

results.definition_en: With no rough parts; even on the surface.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 平滑的、光滑的;表面均勻、無粗糙處。
results.example_en: The stone is smooth from the river water.
results.example_zh_tw: 那顆石頭因河水沖刷而光滑。

results.definition_en: That keeps to things one's hand touches.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 黏的、黏稠的;會附著於所觸之物。
results.example_en: The cake is sticky on my fingers.

results.definition_en: Not soft or able to bend easily.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 硬挺的、僵硬的;不柔軟或不易彎曲。
results.example_en: The card is stiff and straight.

results.definition_en: Going one way with no bend.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 直的、筆直的;無彎曲地朝一方延伸。
results.example_en: Draw a straight line on the page.

results.definition_en: Having great power or able to take much weight.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 強壯的、堅固的;具大力量或可承重。
results.example_en: He has very strong arms.

results.definition_en: Happening at once, without warning.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 突然的、忽然的;毫無預警地發生。
results.example_en: There was a sudden noise outside.

results.definition_en: Tasting like sugar; pleasing to the tongue.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 甜的;如糖之味、令舌愉悅。
results.example_en: The cake is too sweet for me.
results.example_zh_tw: 這蛋糕對我來說太甜了。

results.definition_en: Higher than most others of its kind.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 高的;比同類更高的。
results.example_en: She is a tall woman.

results.definition_en: With great measure from one side to the other; or with many parts close together.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 厚的、稠密的;雙側距離大或內含物緊密。
results.example_en: The book is thick and heavy.

results.definition_en: Held close, with no loose room.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 緊的、緊密的;貼合無鬆餘地。
results.example_en: Tie the rope tight.

results.definition_en: In need of rest; not feeling fresh.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 疲累的、勞累的;需要休息、非神清氣爽。
results.example_en: I am tired after the long walk.
results.example_zh_tw: 走了那麼長一段路我累了。

results.definition_en: In accord with fact; not made up.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 真實的、確實的;符合事實、非虛構。
results.example_en: It is true that I was at the meeting.
results.example_zh_tw: 我確實出席了那場會議。

results.definition_en: Using great force, often to do harm.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 暴力的、強烈的;以強力造成傷害。
results.example_en: There was a violent storm last night.
results.example_zh_tw: 昨晚有一場猛烈的風暴。

results.definition_en: Staying in one place till something happens.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 等待的;留在原處直到某事發生。
results.example_en: The waiting room was full of people.

results.definition_en: A little hot; pleasing to the body.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 暖和的、溫暖的;略熱、令身體舒適。
results.example_en: The room is warm and dry.

results.definition_en: Covered or full of water.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 濕的、潮濕的;被水覆蓋或充滿水分。
results.example_en: Her hair is wet from the rain.

results.definition_en: Of great measure from one side to the other.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 寬的、寬闊的;兩側相距大的。
results.example_en: The river is wide and deep.

results.definition_en: Having good knowledge and able to use it well.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 明智的、有智慧的;具良好知識且能善用之。
results.example_en: She is a wise old woman.

results.definition_en: Of the colour of the sun or gold.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 黃色的;如太陽或黃金之色。
results.example_en: The leaves turn yellow in autumn.

results.definition_en: Of few years; not old.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 年輕的;年歲少、非老的。
results.example_en: She is a young woman at twenty.
results.example_zh_tw: 她二十歲，是個年輕女性。
